programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Playboy Playmates
programme.desc: Playboy founder Hugh Hefner's girlfriend, Miss November 2010 Shera Bechard, moved in to the Mansion with her Chihuahua mix, Willa, who needs Cesar's help to stop bullying Hef's 2-year-old King Charles spaniel Charlie.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs
programme.desc: Cesar stops by the motor home of NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick and his wife DeLana to help get their Chihuahua, Lo, in line before they welcome their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In a previous episode, Cesar worked with two people who were struggling to overcome their fear of dogs. Now, the tables have turned as Cesar takes on the challenge of helping dogs overcome their fears.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Bear Necessities
programme.desc: It’s spring at ZooTampa, and the animals are emerging from hibernation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: One Way or the Otter
programme.desc: Baby fever takes over ZooTampa as the penguin keepers are on egg watch.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Hungry, Hungry Dragons
programme.desc: Walter, a Florida panther, is getting a thorough exam after getting caught in a snare.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Killer Tactics
programme.desc: Learn the techniques used by Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mysteries of Vanishing Paradise
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise and a once thriving South African community are now all mysteriously deserted and desolate landscapes; experts investigate the secrets of these remarkable places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins. Then... a mother of five is shot in the head and it's up to Kenda to uncover the truth behind her untimely death.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Murder in Bowling Green
programme.desc: A Western Kentucky University freshman is assaulted and set on fire in her own dorm room. When police find out about a fraternity party on the night of her attack, they are faced with a growing list of suspects and motives.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend
programme.desc: Young mother Tyshika Askins is found dead in her home but after charging the wrong man, police knew the key to solving the case lies is an OJ container left out on a kitchen counter.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: High-Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: Pest control worker Kim Cain was convicted of murdering a 71-year-old Palm Beach socialite. The prosecution argued she found Cain stealing her jewelry to support a gambling addiction. Cain's family is hoping Chris and Fatima can prove his innocence.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend

programme.title: Murder in Bowling Green
programme.desc: A Western Kentucky University freshman is assaulted and set on fire in her own dorm room. When police find out about a fraternity party on the night of her attack, they are faced with a growing list of suspects and motives.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Hidden Evil
programme.desc: After years in foster care, Shannon Stafford longs for love and a family. When she meets Nathan Mitchell and his parents she thinks her search is over. Soon after they marry Nathan she learns that her new "loving family" has no love for her at all.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love's Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Shawna Smith marries Ryan Sorenson, a young man she always considered to be just a friend. But they are shocked when Ryan shows up in Shawna's hometown armed with two handguns and deadly intentions.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Selfish Desires
programme.desc: Rebecca Osborne appears charming as she pursues widower Jerry Barker, but disaster is in store for her new groom. Jerry's children fear the worst when they uncover their stepmother's dark secret, which alludesto what's to come for their loving dad.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: She Can't Hide
programme.desc: Beautiful Elisa Redelsberger appears eager to start a new life when she meets softhearted lawyer and devoted father, Larry McNabney. But few suspect the depth of evil behind Elisa's façade until she pulls off the ultimate disappearing act.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A young woman is raped and murdered, and the case drags on for seven years. Twins, Brian and Alfred Calzacorto, become suspects when DNA puts them at the scene. But, identical twins with identical DNA mean authorities can't say prove who is guilty.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Justice for MLK: The Hunt for James Earl Ray
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the assassination of Martin Luther King and the desperate search for his killer which was (and remains to this day) the biggest, most extensive manhunt ever conducted, and the first to use forensic techniques.

programme.title: Impact of Hate: Charlottesville
programme.desc: Charlottesville votes to remove its confederate statues, and the Far Right descends for 2017's Unite the Right Rally. As concerned citizens gather against an influx of hate, a car plows into a crowd, killing Heather Heyer, on her first demonstration.

programme.title: Justice for MLK: The Hunt for James Earl Ray
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the assassination of Martin Luther King and the desperate search for his killer which was (and remains to this day) the biggest, most extensive manhunt ever conducted, and the first to use forensic techniques.

programme.desc: Charlottesville votes to remove its confederate statues, and the Far Right descends for 2017's Unite the Right Rally. As concerned citizens gather against an influx of hate, a car plows into a crowd, killing Heather Heyer, on her first demonstration.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the secrets to turning the blueberry into a year-round treat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dillicious
programme.desc: Alton helps a humble cucumber fulfill its culinary destiny of becoming a pickle.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Slicer
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he explores what it takes to stay sharp in the kitchen and demystifies the relationship between the cook and his cutlery, with a recipe for Gazpacho.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sitka
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Sitka, Alaska, where the preparation of iconic Alaskan staples like king salmon, venison and rockfish has evolved with finesse.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean has a date with Lady Luck and is ready to go all-in on some tempting Vegas eats. He'll find out how prime rib lured us all to Sin City, and why prohibition poured us all a shrimp cocktail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Michael McKean turns our plates into a playground as he finds out the stories behind some famously fun foods! He'll spell out a solution to the Great Depression using alphabet soup and more.

programme.title: Good Eats: Orange Aid
programme.desc: Oranges aren't just for juice any more as host Alton Brown explores their symphony of flavours to create a classic drink, a tasty topping and a creamy cold dessert.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid X: The Dark Side of the Cane
programme.desc: Alton shows how to cook with molasses instead of sugar.

programme.title: Good Eats: Gills Gone Wild
programme.desc: Wild salmon can be a shock to the budget but host Alton Brown proves that it is worth every penny if properly and simply prepared.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the code to true 'cue: brined pork, a flower pot, a trashcan, hardwood smoke and a lot of patience, resulting in a delicious Pulled Pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation IV: Crawfish
programme.desc: Alton Brown discovers the sustainable alternative to lobster, the crawfish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tamale Never Dies

programme.desc: A gunman storms a family's home, killing the parents and leaving their teenage daughter in critical condition. When their hate crime investigation leads to a dead end, Benson and the detectives struggle to find a motive for the violence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Decaying Morality
programme.desc: Benson and Rollins find a teenage girl in the street and she fingers a man with a criminal record. A conflict of interest arises when it's discovered the suspect has a pending lawsuit against the NYPD.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parole Violations
programme.desc: Detective Carisi's sister Bella prepares for her wedding and the upcoming birth of her child, but then her fiancee falls into bad habits and accuses his parole office of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: A student disappears on a school trip to New York City, leading cops to race to find a masked man. Fin and Stone get visits from family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Closet Case
programme.desc: Being the cool dad that he is, Phil helps Haley convince Claire to allow Dylan to move in temporarily, but after seeing how intimate living together means, Phil is having major second thoughts.

programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy
programme.desc: Phil is all in on project hatch-the-duck-eggs, even building a whole habitat for them. No one else is as enthused about this project and Lily is the only one suckered into helping him.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil's Sexy, Sexy House

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dirty
programme.desc: Detective Saliyah 'Sunny' Qadri goes in search of District Attorney Page Ferguson, who she fears may be in danger. Qadri finds Ferguson just in time to witness her fall from the top of a parking garage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Flight
programme.desc: When it is discovered that a teenage girl is suffering from Post Traumatic Stress Disorder due to sexual abuse, all leads point to a billionaire. As the detectives investigate, the billionaire involves his lawyer, who throws the whole case awry.

programme.title: Dateline: Heart of Darkness

programme.title: Dateline: Diabolical

programme.title: NCIS: Lt. Jane Doe

programme.title: NCIS: Crescent City

programme.title: The Office: Whistleblower

programme.title: The Office: Nepotism

programme.title: The Office: Counselling

programme.title: The Balancing Act: New Year, New You
programme.desc: How to improve your smile with Invisalign; supplements to fuel your body & protein you actually enjoy taking; Quick Bytes with Ralph Pagano--Plant-based; tools to help you reach your health & wellness goals; how to develop your child's reading skills.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It's the End of the World
programme.desc: Meredith's fear that she's in for a bad day when a medical case arrives at Seattle Grace that threatens the lives of everyone in the operating room.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: As We Know It
programme.desc: Despite the best efforts of Seattle Grace's staff, the code black situation escalates.

programme.title: The Closer: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When the star witness in a death-row inmate's appeal case is gunned down, Brenda and her team discover that there is more than one suspect with a motive. Meanwhile, Chief Pope's vengeful ex-wife airs Brenda's secrets in front of her team.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of a tech-entrepreneur with questionable morals and possible mob connections has the division working overtime. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to feel accepted when Raydor's son Ricky comes to visit.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Zoo Story
programme.desc: The LAPD finds itself in a precarious situation during an investigation into the disappearances of a string of young girls from a nightclub leading to a turf battle between the Major Crimes division and the Special Operations Bureau.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Down the Drain
programme.desc: A surrogate adoption gets complicated, leaving one person dead and a lot of people searching for answers. The Major Crimes division gets their hands dirty as they explore LA's underground water system.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Wealthy Widow
programme.desc: A widow's tears after her husband's roadside murder on the Ohio Turnpike help investigators uncover secret drug addictions and illicit affairs.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: The brutal slaying of a Fresno family leaves one heir to the family fortune and investigators searching for answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Moonshiners: No Ordinary Run
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws unleash a 700-gallon run on a whisper-quiet steamer still. Mark and Huck traverse Appalachia's roughest terrain to run liquor with moonshine legend Jim Tom. Mike and Jerry engineer a high-tech solution to a backwoods problem.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's plan to employ an out of work friend backfires on payday. Tim invents a low-cost way to make his first single-malt moonshine. With their backwoods column still cranking out liquor, Mike discovers Jerry isn't carrying his own weight.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Single Malt Moonshine

programme.title: Moonshiners: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: After Mike asks the wrong shiner for help, Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. On a mountain run, Mark and Huck nearly meet the barrel of a gun. Jerry attempts a comeback as a land sale forces him and Mike to abandon their column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a meal made entirely out of produce from Murr's backyard. Plus, Wayne Brady, the greatest improviser of all time, joins the conversation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: Grayson is invited to his first dance and Todd and Julie are conflicted about him growing up. Meanwhile, Todd puts Savannah's and Nanny Faye's driving skills to the test in Savannah's new ride.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When Todd offers to be a chauffeur for Faye and her sister Francis, he gets more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Julie opens a boutique real estate office, but things go awry when she offers to sell Savannah's house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Prank Master
programme.desc: When Savannah decides to drop out of college Todd hatches a plan to get her back in class. Meanwhile Nanny Faye works overtime to pull an epic prank on Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Remission Control
programme.desc: The Chrisley's take it to the gutter with a family bowling tournament. And while Julie waits to hear if her cancer is in remission, the family plans a surprise for her.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Differing Strokes
programme.desc: Todd and Chase team up for a not so friendly golf match against Jay Demarcus. And Savannah attempts to move in with Nanny Faye only to discover there's no room at the inn!

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaways and Segways
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah butt heads while planning a fashion show for charity. Meanwhile, Chase helps Nanny Faye apply for a job as a Segway tour guide to win a bet with Todd.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Rewind
programme.desc: Take a nostalgic look back at the stories that made the Kardashians who they are today, with an exclusive look ahead to season 11.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: The Daily Pop

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Animal House
programme.desc: Todd gets more than he bargained for when he offers to watch a house full of children. And Julie struggles to let her hair down on a girls' weekend.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Tantrums and Tiaras
programme.desc: Grayson's dream to visit Universal Orlando's Volcano Bay is in jeopardy when his parents work gets in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Quit Your Pitchin'
programme.desc: Todd attempts to train Savannah for a charity softball game despite not knowing how to play himself. When Todd neglects to help Grayson train his new puppy he gets on Julie's bad side.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truckin' Good Time
programme.desc: Julie bites off more than she can chew when she agrees to make desserts for a food truck event. Meanwhile, Grayson gets a lesson from Todd about what it means to be truly sorry.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Granny's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Faye threatens to move back to Atlanta after being upset by Todd. Meanwhile, Julie struggles to get Grayson ready to start his new school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Baking Bad
programme.desc: Julie and Faye battle over who will host the Chrisley family Thanksgiving dinner. Meanwhile, Todd struggles to find a cure for his insomnia.

programme.title: Chopped: Victory on the Brain
programme.desc: The chefs have to create an appetizer out of goat brains, turn trash into tasty and a smelly surprise waits for them in basket three.

programme.title: Chopped: Thirsty for Victory
programme.desc: The chefs start off fast in the appetizer round with lump crabmeat and ice cream cones.

programme.title: Chopped: Scoop's On!
programme.desc: It's an ice cream dream come true with an entire 'Chopped' competition devoted to everyone's favourite sweet, cold treat. In the first round, the chefs find some beautiful gourmet scoops in cones, which they must find a way to make work with halibut.

programme.title: Chopped: Saying Sayonara
programme.desc: The challengers are faced with a basket of oysters and two Japanese ingredients.

programme.title: Chopped: Chard and True
programme.desc: The four chefs take on an eight-armed mystery ingredient in the appetizer round. The judges wonder if the cooperative behavior they see in the kitchen will continue after someone is chopped.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 3
programme.desc: Four champs who were previously defeated return to the kitchen, hungry for sweet redemption. Sardines are the main protein in the appetizer basket, and a jiggly mustard-flavored surprise threatens to throw the chefs off their game in the second round.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Greek, Sweet, and Open-Faced Eats
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to go Greek, then it's time to see who will bring the sweet and who will see defeat in a fruity dessert challenge. Finally, it all comes down to one last - and open - face-off.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweet Heat
programme.desc: First, it's a pizza puzzle when the chefs open the appetizer basket to find something that's called pizza but doesn't look or taste like the dish they know and love. Two proteins in the second round require the competitors' attention.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pantry Faves
programme.desc: It's a quiet weekend for Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, on the farm, so Molly's making an inexpensive lunch using her favorite pantry ingredients. She starts with harissa-braised chickpeas with feta and adds yogurt marinated chicken skewers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pizza Friday
programme.desc: It's Pizza Friday on the farm, and Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are hosting friends for dinner. Molly's making two pizzas using the same delicious dough recipe: sausage and kale pizza and squash and ricotta pizza with fresh squash from the farm.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Ladies Who Brunch
programme.desc: Molly shares her favourite meal of the day with some of her favourite friends from Grand Fords, N.D. She's making them a brunch feast that includes a mini kale shakshuka, a sweet potato and bacon hash and her make ahead baked challah French toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Book Club Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is hosting book club on the farm. She makes walnut-crusted brie mac and cheese, succulent skillet pork chops with salsa verde, squash and apple salad with mustardy dressing and, for dessert, Dakota-style plum cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Just Me and the Girls
programme.desc: The guys are away and so it's 24 hours of just Ree Drummond and the girls. She's whipping up a blueberry crumb cake for breakfast while they play with the new puppies. For dinner its petite filets with wasabi cilantro cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blogger Battle
programme.desc: Four of America's hottest food bloggers go head to head in a culinary battle worth up to $20,000. "Between two buns," tacos without taco ingredients, and a "trending dinner" are the challenges.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All
programme.desc: The chefs are taking a big spin around the market with three rounds of Food Wheel games! First, chefs spin the budget wheel to win a paltry $9.04 for their pork dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Flavortown Honors Firefighters
programme.desc: Four firefighter chefs put their culinary chops to the test.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Milk Money

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck. Now, the happy couple and their twins need help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky in Lafayette
programme.desc: This Louisiana man was homeless and crashing on his son's couch when he won $2 million. Now David is helping the lucky overnight millionaire find the perfect property in Lafayette where he can party with his family and enjoy his fortunes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Great American Dream Home
programme.desc: Brenda and Jesse were living in a tiny apartment in Columbus, Ohio, when they won a million-dollar lottery. Now, David Bromstad takes them on an emotional and memorable journey to help them find their American dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Sparkle in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a couple seeks a home in Jupiter, FL, which is renowned for the lifestyle it offers to the rich and famous. Florida's booming population and low stock challenge David Bromstad to find a glamorous home at the right price.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Newlywed Millionaires
programme.desc: After these newlyweds bought a lotto ticket at a gas station, they filled up both their gas tank and their bank account. They are on the hunt for their dream home in Columbus, Ohio, where they can start a family.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A young family of five looks to put down roots in Florida by building their forever home on a 2-acre lot. Brian and Mika mix modern touches with rustic, farmhouse charm to create a dream home the family can enjoy for years to come.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Home Before Baby

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: 90 Day Dream Home

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: A Tale of Two Cories

programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a weapon using only reclaimed metal. With the clock winding down, two of the competitors are dramatically forced to improvise, and one almost doesn't make it through the round at all.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Washington's Colichemarde
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths honor some of the greatest Americans of all time--the Presidents. Bladesmiths recreate an intricate Presidential weapon: George Washington's Colichemarde.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Roman Gladius
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths heat, hammer and grind their way through a challenge where they must turn a steel ball bearing into a fully functional weapon. After a gruelling round of tests that literally breaks a blade in two, the finalists create the Roman gladius.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knights Templar
programme.desc: Four smiths must use rusty chain mail and steel to forge Knights Templar Crusader daggers. After elimination results in the final two smiths, they must head home to forge the magnificent Knights Templar Crusader sword within five days.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Bagh Nakh Blades
programme.desc: Initially, smiths are challenged to forge canister Damascus with nuts and bolts. Two finalists move on and must return to their home forges to craft a pair of vicious Indian Bagh Nakh blades.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Smallsword
programme.desc: The bladesmiths are first tasked with forging friction folders from a huge steel coil, so that can withstand any kind of test. The two remaining smiths must create the precise and intricate French smallsword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Greek Kopis
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must use different sizes of spinning wheel to forge a signature blade. Competitors vary in degrees of success when toiling with the canister Damascus technique. The two that survive must recreate a legendary weapon: the Greek Kopis.

programme.title: Movie: The Women
programme.desc: A woman's marital problems fuel the gossip within a circle of Park Avenue women.

programme.title: Movie: Camille
programme.desc: A kept woman leaves her patron when she falls in love with a young man. In fear of ruining his career prospects and his position in society, she leaves him and soon falls into poverty and illness.

programme.title: Movie: Smilin' Through
programme.desc: A woman falls for the son of her aunt's killer, despite her uncle's objections.

programme.title: Movie: Adam's Rib
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife lawyers argue opposite sides in a sensational women's rights case.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Stock
programme.desc: Romance is in the air as a theater group takes over a farm to put together a production.

programme.title: Movie: The Postman Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: Problems arise for two illicit lovers when they plot to kill the woman's older husband for insurance money.

programme.title: Movie: Love Crazy
programme.desc: A happily married man goes to extreme lengths to prevent his wife from divorcing him.

programme.title: Movie: Ode to Billy Joe
programme.desc: A young couple meet and fall in love, but their relationship is altered after a tragedy.

programme.title: Movie: Polo Joe

programme.title: Movie: The Fabulous Joe

programme.title: Movie: The Story of G.I. Joe

programme.title: Movie: Joe Smith, American
programme.desc: A man working at a munitions plant is kidnapped by Nazis, who pump him for information.

programme.title: Movie: A Guy Named Joe
programme.desc: A deceased World War Two pilot comes back to Earth to give his friend a hand in romance.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Sore Louser
programme.desc: It's time for the annual 'Sportsmanship Games' against Kikiwaka's rival, Camp Champion. Lou tries her best to 'coach up' the campers knowing that Kikiwaka loses every year.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Gwen is surprised when her older brother Jasper unexpectedly shows up to Camp Kikiwaka and encourages her to leave with him.

programme.title: Jessie: One Day Wonders
programme.desc: After a music producer spots Jessie singing a song she wrote, she is over the moon with excitement about the possibility that her big break has finally arrived. Meanwhile, Bertram enlists Emma to help style him for his social network profile photo.

programme.title: Jessie: Zuri's New Old Friend
programme.desc: Jessie wants Zuri to play with real friends instead of imaginary ones, but when Zuri befriends the much older Nana Bananas who wears yellow track suits, talks to herself in the park and constantly squeaks a yellow horn, Jessie is worried.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Falcon and the Raven
programme.desc: After having a vision of his mom losing her hidden money, Booker asks Nia and Levi to assist him in following Raven, hoping to stop the money from going missing.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Falcon and the Raven
programme.desc: After having a vision of his mom losing her hidden money, Booker asks Nia and Levi to assist him in following Raven, hoping to stop the money from going missing.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Girlz II Women

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: My Best Friends' Ending
programme.desc: Sydney hosts a slumber party with all of her friends, but the night takes a turn when Emmy and Sophia have a huge disagreement, reminiscent of when a pair of expensive sneakers came between Max and Leo in the '90s.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Manic Moose Day
programme.desc: When Lou's travel-blogger friend, Sean, visits camp, Lou hopes it will help drive some business. Lou quickly realizes it may be harder to impress her than expected.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Breaking Barb
programme.desc: The Southern Northeast Conference of Camp Directors encourages Lou and Barb to participate in a camp director swap program.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross

programme.title: Bunk'd: Kikiwaka's Got Talent

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Fresh Starts and Farewells

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Future Sounds and Festival Songs

programme.title: Sofia the First: Scrambled Pets

programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: Jessie gets two wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket. Bertram bonds with a talking coffee maker who Luke tries to steal to help him study for his Spanish test.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World
programme.desc: After two officers are murdered by a highly trained and knowledgeable killer, Voight struggles to keep the case contained. At the same time, Lindsay confronts Antonio about his new job.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case
programme.desc: Severide is brought in for questioning after his car is found to have caused a deadly accident. As the investigation gets underway, the team uncovers a group of car-jackers may be the key to Severide's innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Monster Preacher: Monster Preacher

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Mirinda Boob & Ron Heichel
programme.desc: A wife and mother seeks attention outside her marriage and triggers a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Keri Murphy & Rebecca Keller
programme.desc: Two teen lovers fall under suspicion when someone close to them meets a deadly end.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Tammy Holman & Charlie Miller
programme.desc: A lonely man longing for affection finds the attention he needs in an unlikely person...but his desire has lethal ramifications.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The body of Kathy Blair, a choir director, is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The gruesome crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a depraved killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Khan
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a successful business manager and expecting father leads Texas detectives to a seedy underworld and a spiteful killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Dillard
programme.desc: A young mother of two on her way to a birthday party is gunned down on the side of a rural highway. The ensuing investigation reveals fraying within a tight-knit family.

programme.title: Snapped: Janice Dodson
programme.desc: A newlyweds hunting trip becomes lethal when a woman finds her husband shot dead, sending investigators to track a muddy trail of bullet holes, deception, and dirty laundry left by a devious murderer.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Alvarez
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches in southern California, a family of three mysteriously goes missing. During their search for answers, investigators unearth a haunting message that points to murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Legendary showman P.T. Barnum launches his iconic and legendary circus and museum, assembling a collection of performers, oddities, animals and outcasts to create the greatest show on Earth, succeeding despite countless doubters and setbacks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Towboy
programme.desc: Feeling that Maggie is getting too clingy, Marge hires a counsellor to teach her to become more independent. Meanwhile, Homer gets a little too carried away with his new job as a tow truck driver.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Don't Wanna Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
programme.desc: Marge convinces a bank robber, Dwight, to turn himself over to the police by promising to visit him in prison. When Marge fails to keep her promise, Dwight escapes to find her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Orphan Millie
programme.desc: When Milhouse's parents are lost at sea and presumed dead, his new orphan status makes him cooler than Bart. Meanwhile, Homer gets himself in hot water when he can't remember the colour of Marge's eyes.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy
programme.desc: After Peter and the guys get caught pretending to be military veterans and are found guilty of the Stolen Valor Act, a judge sentences them to join the U.S. Coast Guard.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Squashes Their Beefs

programme.desc: Mac oversees the gang while they compete to break Wade Boggs’ legendary beer drinking record.

programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Madagascar: Island of Marvels
programme.desc: Examine clues from Madagascar's animals, plants and landscape to discover how the island's past has produced its present; the Tsingy have cut off animals in isolated gorges allowing them to evolve unique species.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Alaskan Built
programme.desc: In order to endure dark winter, the next generation must roam Alaska’s great expanse.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: The Ice Harvest
programme.desc: It’s a season of firsts to survive dark winter for the next generation of Alaskans.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Over Thin Ice
programme.desc: The next generation of Alaskans prepare for uncharted obstacles in order to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Trail Breakers
programme.desc: Winter’s grasp tightens on the Arctic, and young Alaskans rush to prepare for its wrath.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: In the Blood
programme.desc: As fall wanes across the Arctic, the next generation of Alaskans prepare for dark winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: Winter is Coming
programme.desc: Kim and Pierre establish a new camp in an unexplored part of the Yukon; Desperate for a supply of winter meat, Becky embarks on an early season moose hunt; 'Pike' Mike and Bentley attempt to secure their essential food sources before winter sets in.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: In the Blood
programme.desc: As fall wanes across the Arctic, the next generation of Alaskans prepare for dark winter.

programme.title: Port Protection: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Inhabitants must carve their own road to survival in a remote Alaskan community.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: The Mighty Mekong of Laos
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels through Laos, Asia, on a mission to unlock the secrets of its cuisine.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Peru's Sacred Valley
programme.desc: In Peru’s Sacred Valley, Gordon Ramsay uncovers the secrets of high-altitude Andean cuisine.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Sumatra's Stunning Highlands
programme.desc: In the West Sumatra highlands, Chef Ramsay unlocks the secrets of Padang-style cooking.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: India's Spice Hub
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay discovers the culinary secrets of southern India, the birthplace of spices.
